meta.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest product artifact of the day with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at real-time, interruption-tolerant voice interaction. Zhipu AI expanded its Intel partnership to put Qingyan and CodeGeeX on AI PCs, while new research on transformer hallucinations and billion-parameter interatomic potentials pointed to potentially important advances in model reliability and scientific AI infrastructure.

items.title: Hallucination as Trajectory Commitment: Causal Evidence for Asymmetric Attractor Dynamics in Transformer Generation
items.summary_short: We present causal evidence that hallucination in autoregressive language models is an early trajectory commitment governed by asymmetric attractor dynamics.

topic_refs.headline: Hallucination as Trajectory Commitment Paper Offers Causal Mechanism for Transformer Errors

items.title: Breaking the Training Barrier of Billion-Parameter Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
items.summary_short: Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (uMLIPs), pre-trained on massively diverse datasets encompassing inorganic materials and organic molecules across the entire periodic table, serve as foundational models for quantum-accurate physical simulations.

topic_refs.headline: Breaking the Training Barrier of Billion-Parameter Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials Targets Scientific AI Scale-Up

items.title: Neural Continuous-Time Markov Chain: Discrete Diffusion via Decoupled Jump Timing and Direction
items.summary_short: Discrete diffusion models based on continuous-time Markov chains (CTMCs) have shown strong performance on language and discrete data generation, yet existing approaches typically parameterize the reverse rate matrix as a single object -- via concrete scores, clean-data predictions

topic_refs.headline: Neural Continuous-Time Markov Chain: Discrete Diffusion via Decoupled Jump Timing and Direction

items.title: Geometric regularization of autoencoders via observed stochastic dynamics
items.summary_short: Stochastic dynamical systems with slow or metastable behavior evolve, on long time scales, on an unknown low-dimensional manifold in high-dimensional ambient space.

topic_refs.headline: Geometric regularization of autoencoders via observed stochastic dynamics

items.title: Faster LLM Inference via Sequential Monte Carlo
items.summary_short: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates language model inference by drafting tokens from a cheap proposal model and verifying them against an expensive target model via rejection sampling.

topic_refs.headline: Faster LLM Inference via Sequential Monte Carlo

items.title: Collective Kernel EFT for Pre-activation ResNets
items.summary_short: In finite-width deep neural networks, the empirical kernel $G$ evolves stochastically across layers. We develop a collective kernel effective field theory (EFT) for pre-activation ResNets based on a $G$-only closure hierarchy and diagnose its finite validity window.

topic_refs.headline: Collective Kernel EFT for Pre-activation ResNets

items.title: Closing the Theory-Practice Gap in Spiking Transformers via Effective Dimension
items.summary_short: Spiking transformers achieve competitive accuracy with conventional transformers while offering $38$-$57\times$ energy efficiency on neuromorphic hardware, yet no theoretical framework guides their design. This paper establishes the first comprehensive expressivity theory for spiking self-attention.

topic_refs.headline: Closing the Theory-Practice Gap in Spiking Transformers via Effective Dimension

items.title: When Do Early-Exit Networks Generalize? A PAC-Bayesian Theory of Adaptive Depth
items.summary_short: Early-exit neural networks enable adaptive computation by allowing confident predictions to exit at intermediate layers, achieving 2-8$\times$ inference speedup.

items.title: The Price of Paranoia: Robust Risk-Sensitive Cooperation in Non-Stationary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
items.summary_short: Cooperative equilibria are fragile. When agents learn alongside each other rather than in a fixed environment, the process of learning destabilizes the cooperation they are trying to sustain: every gradient step an agent takes shifts the distribution of actions its partner will play, turning a
tags: World Models, Exploration, and Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning

items.title: The Harder Path: Last Iterate Convergence for Uncoupled Learning in Zero-Sum Games with Bandit Feedback
items.summary_short: We study the problem of learning in zero-sum matrix games with repeated play and bandit feedback. Specifically, we focus on developing uncoupled algorithms that guarantee, without communication between players, the convergence of the last-iterate to a Nash equilibrium.
tags: World Models, Exploration, and Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning

items.title: SecureRouter: Encrypted Routing for Efficient Secure Inference
items.summary_short: Cryptographically secure neural network inference typically relies on secure computing techniques such as Secure Multi-Party Computation (MPC), enabling cloud servers to process client inputs without decrypting them.

featured_topics.headline: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM Debut from ByteDance Seed
featured_topics.summary_short: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The release introduces a new version of the company's foundation model lineup
featured_topics.why_it_matters: ByteDance is signaling continued investment in both frontier multimodal models and voice interfaces, which matters for competitors tracking Chinese model capabilities and enterprise buyers evaluating real-time speech stacks.
key_takeaways: ByteDance Seed released Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, giving the market a named preview artifact rather than a vague roadmap announcement.

Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM was introduced with emphasis on attentive listening, interference suppression, and more natural real-time interaction, pointing to a push beyond turn-based voice assistants.

The same announcement stream also opened ByteDance Seed's 2027 foundation-model campus recruiting program, a signal that the company is still scaling long-horizon research capacity alongside productization.

evidence.title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena

featured_topics.headline: Zhipu Qingyan and CodeGeeX Expand to Intel AI PCs in Deeper Zhipu AI Partnership
featured_topics.summary_short: Zhipu AI announced expanded cooperation with Intel at the Intel AI PC ecosystem event. The partnership delivered on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX AI coding assistant for AI PCs, alongside other end-cloud integrated AI PC innovations
featured_topics.why_it_matters: This is a concrete distribution move for on-device AI in China, relevant to OEMs, chip vendors, and software leaders deciding where local inference and AI PC demand may consolidate.
key_takeaways: Zhipu AI said its cooperation with Intel now includes on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX coding assistant for AI PCs.
The partnership was presented at an Intel AI PC ecosystem event, indicating Intel is using named application partners rather than only generic platform claims to support its AI PC strategy.

Zhipu AI also disclosed plans to publish full-year 2025 results on March 31, 2026, with the notice identifying Hong Kong stock code 02513, adding public-market visibility to a major Chinese model company.

evidence.title: Zhipu AI and Intel deepen AI PC partnership
Zhipu AI publishes its first earnings report notice

featured_topics.headline: Hallucination as Trajectory Commitment Paper Offers Causal Mechanism for Transformer Errors
featured_topics.summary_short: We present causal evidence that hallucination in autoregressive language models is an early trajectory commitment governed by asymmetric attractor dynamics.
featured_topics.why_it_matters: If validated, this work could shift hallucination mitigation from post-hoc filtering toward earlier intervention in generation dynamics, affecting model safety, eval design, and inference control.
key_takeaways: The paper argues hallucinations arise from early trajectory commitment in autoregressive generation, framed as asymmetric attractor dynamics rather than only missing knowledge or weak decoding.
Its core method is same-prompt bifurcation: repeatedly sampling identical inputs to observe spontaneous divergence and isolate when generations commit to correct versus hallucinatory paths.

The contribution is causal in framing, not just descriptive, which makes it more strategically relevant for teams building decoding controls, interpretability tools, or reliability-focused model products.

evidence.title: Hallucination as Trajectory Commitment: Causal Evidence for Asymmetric Attractor Dynamics in Transformer Generation

featured_topics.headline: Breaking the Training Barrier of Billion-Parameter Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials Targets Scientific AI Scale-Up
featured_topics.summary_short: Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (uMLIPs), pre-trained on massively diverse datasets encompassing inorganic materials and organic molecules across the entire periodic table, serve as foundational models for quantum-accurate physical simulations.
featured_topics.why_it_matters: This is the strongest science-facing infrastructure artifact in the set, with implications for materials discovery, molecular simulation, and the compute economics of foundation models for physics.
key_takeaways: The paper focuses on billion-parameter universal machine learning interatomic potentials, or uMLIPs, designed as foundation models for quantum-accurate physical simulation across inorganic materials and organic molecules.
Its central claim is that it addresses the training bottleneck that has limited scaling of these models, a key constraint for labs and startups trying to build general-purpose scientific simulators.

The authors position uMLIPs as pre-trained on highly diverse datasets spanning the periodic table, which, if borne out, would make them more analogous to general foundation models than narrow chemistry predictors.

evidence.title: Breaking the Training Barrier of Billion-Parameter Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
